Uses of Record Class
io.bloviate.db.CommitStrategy

Packages that use CommitStrategy
Package
Description
io.bloviate.db
 

  • Uses of CommitStrategy in io.bloviate.db

    Methods in io.bloviate.db that return CommitStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CommitStrategy
    DatabaseConfiguration.commitStrategy()
    Returns the value of the commitStrategy record component.
    static CommitStrategy
    CommitStrategy.connectionDefault()
    The back-compatible default: the engine never changes the connection's autocommit state.
    static CommitStrategy
    CommitStrategy.everyNBatches(int n)
    Autocommit off, commit after every n JDBC batches.
    static CommitStrategy
    CommitStrategy.perTable()
    Autocommit off, a single commit once the table is fully filled.
    Methods in io.bloviate.db with parameters of type CommitStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TableFiller.Builder
    TableFiller.Builder.commitStrategy(CommitStrategy commitStrategy)
    Overrides the CommitStrategy for this table fill.
    Constructors in io.bloviate.db with parameters of type CommitStrategy
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, long seed, CommitStrategy commitStrategy)
    Creates a configuration with the given base seed and CommitStrategy, and no custom GeneratorRegistry.
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, long seed, CommitStrategy commitStrategy, BulkLoadStrategy bulkLoadStrategy)
    Creates a configuration with the given base seed, CommitStrategy and BulkLoadStrategy, and no custom GeneratorRegistry.
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, GeneratorRegistry generatorRegistry, long seed, CommitStrategy commitStrategy)
    Creates a configuration with a custom GeneratorRegistry, base seed and CommitStrategy, and the default BulkLoadStrategy (preserves the original seven-argument signature).
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, GeneratorRegistry generatorRegistry, long seed, CommitStrategy commitStrategy, BulkLoadStrategy bulkLoadStrategy)
    Normalizes a null commitStrategy to CommitStrategy.connectionDefault() and a null bulkLoadStrategy to BulkLoadStrategy.ordered() so the back-compatible behavior applies whenever a caller does not specify them.
     
    TableFiller(Connection connection, Database database, DatabaseConfiguration databaseConfiguration, Table table, CommitStrategy commitStrategy)
    Constructs a new TableFiller with an explicit CommitStrategy override.
